description: Work that turns the v2 operational intelligence pack into a repeatable operationalization layer with connector inputs, reconciliation loops, onboarding, evidence lineage, remediation state, policy preflight, UX surfaces, packaging, pilot readiness, and acceptance gates.

progress_model.description: Ten equally weighted operationalization slices. Completion means the initial v3 pack is implemented and acceptance-gated; it does not imply live production enforcement.

slices.title: Connector input contracts
slices.purpose: Move beyond policy fixtures into dedicated connector input payloads for GitHub, runtime, incidents, deployments, and remediation evidence.

slices.title: Reconciliation loop summaries
slices.purpose: Compare intended policy against imported connector evidence and scanner outputs.

slices.title: Repeatable portfolio onboarding
slices.purpose: Show how new repositories can be added through manifest and scan evidence without custom scanner code.

slices.title: Expanded evidence lineage
slices.purpose: Connect connector inputs, scanner outputs, preflight decisions, remediation records, and acceptance evidence.

slices.title: Operational remediation workflow
slices.purpose: Track owner review, accepted risk, remediation verification, and expiry from connector inputs.

slices.title: Policy preflight CI surface
slices.purpose: Expose deterministic preflight decisions for CI and PR workflows.

slices.title: Product UX surfaces
slices.purpose: Expose v3 operator, product-owner, engineer, and audit views as generated static outputs.

slices.title: Reusable packaging
slices.purpose: Document the reusable CLI, connector contracts, policy packs, and validation commands needed for another portfolio.

slices.title: External pilot readiness
slices.purpose: Define the evidence required before onboarding another product or repository group.

slices.title: v3 acceptance pack
slices.purpose: Prevent overclaiming by requiring generated evidence and explicit boundary statements.
